Greatest_Strength: Strong fiduciary oversight and financial management
Area_for_Improvement: Board diversity does not reflect student population; need to actively recruit members of color
Open_Comments: Our board has grown significantly in capacity over 6 years. We need to be more intentional about recruiting diverse voices to the table. Also need to develop a succession plan for leadership transitions.

Area_for_Improvement: Engaging more deeply with community beyond school events
Open_Comments: I believe we have strong policy governance structures. We should invest more time in community listening sessions and ensure our decisions reflect all stakeholder voices.

Area_for_Improvement: Community engagement - I rarely interact with families directly
Open_Comments: My financial background serves the board well but I recognize I need to be more present in the school community. Planning to attend more events this year.
I think our governance structures are strong for a school our age. The challenge is maintaining appropriate oversight without crossing into management territory. Clear role definitions help.

Area_for_Improvement: Understanding charter school finance and academic data
Open_Comments: I bring a different perspective to this board which I think is valuable. I need more training on reading financial statements and academic data to be fully effective in my role.

Greatest_Strength: Talent and HR perspective and leader evaluation
Area_for_Improvement: Community engagement and understanding family perspectives
Open_Comments: My HR background helps with principal evaluation and talent discussions. I want to find more ways to hear directly from families about their experience.

Greatest_Strength: Educational expertise and understanding of school operations
Area_for_Improvement: Being new - still learning LIA culture and history
Open_Comments: As a former school leader I understand both the board and school perspectives. My newness means I sometimes lack context for decisions. The board orientation was helpful but ongoing learning is important.

Area_for_Improvement: Making time for board responsibilities alongside demanding career
Open_Comments: I value serving on this board but honestly struggle with the time commitment some months. We should discuss whether meeting frequency and committee loads are sustainable for working professionals.
